        films - films to display
        games - games to display
        music - music to display

        prompt - message to display
        Returns:
        int entered by user

      • displayFilteredResults

        public static void displayFilteredResults​(java.util.ArrayList<Media> results)
        displays the filtered media entries
        Parameters:

      • printBoxes

        public static void printBoxes​(java.lang.String[] media)
        prints three boxes
        Parameters:
        media - contains of up to three titles to display inside the box
